title: Briefs + datasets #4–#5 across geographies/indicators (representative)
context: M2 requires reaching at least five cumulative delivered briefs and datasets. This task covers the fourth and fifth brief/dataset pairs, using the scalable template (template-014) to reduce per-brief effort. Indicators and geographies are selected from the triaged catalog with confirmed delivery partner input (partner-013). Each brief/dataset pair must still pass all three review gates. Specific indicators are not yet enumerated in the plan and will be selected from TOPIC-CATALOG.md after further triage.
objective: Produce and deliver briefs and datasets #4 and #5 for FAOSTAT indicators selected from the triaged catalog, using the scalable template (template-014) and passing all three review gates.
acceptanceCriteria: Two distinct FAOSTAT indicators selected from the triaged catalog, each with a committed gate-004 PASS artifact; selection made in consultation with the confirmed delivery partner.

Each derivative dataset built by the deterministic harness: tidy long-format CSV, datapackage.json (Frictionless), and Croissant ML metadata; status flags decoded; uncertainty preserved; source totals reconciled; output checksum committed and re-derived in CI.

Each brief uses the scalable template (template-014), passes the statistical-integrity checklist, passes the non-alarmist editorial review (checklist artifact committed, zero unresolved flags), and includes all required sections and notices.
All three gate sign-offs committed for each brief/dataset pair: domain-expert, editorial, and licence/provenance.
Both delivered/used by the confirmed delivery partner with acceptance-evidence artifacts recorded; verifiedNeed flips to true once confirmed.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commit is DCO signed-off.
output: Two committed derivative datasets (CSV + datapackage.json + Croissant metadata) and two plain-language briefs (#4 and #5), each with all review artifacts and acceptance-evidence artifacts recorded.
